edges.rationale: Shared wall-shield resolution (rampart + reinforced walls) reused across cannonball and grunt wall-attack paths.
edges.removalPlan: Permanent — wall-impact is the canonical home for shield/absorption logic; both subsystems are peers.

edges.rationale: Reinforced Walls absorption is dispatched through the upgrade registry.
edges.removalPlan: Permanent — wall shielding is the upgrade registry's natural consumer for this hook.
